1.name: Expertise
1.description: Double proficiency bonus for two chosen skill proficiencies (or one skill and thieves' tools).

1.name: Sneak Attack
1.description: Deal 1d6 extra damage once per turn when you have advantage or an ally is adjacent to the target. Scales by 1d6 every two levels.

1.name: Thieves' Cant
1.description: Secret rogue language: hidden messages in normal conversation and knowledge of criminal slang.

2.name: Cunning Action
2.description: Bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide on each of your turns.

3.name: Roguish Archetype
3.description: Choose a subclass: Thief, Assassin, Arcane Trickster, Inquisitive, Mastermind, Scout, Soulknife, or Swashbuckler.

5.name: Uncanny Dodge
5.description: Reaction: halve the damage from an attacker you can see when they hit you.

7.name: Evasion
7.description: Dexterity saving throws vs area effects: success = no damage, failure = half damage.

11.name: Reliable Talent
11.description: Any ability check using a proficient skill treats a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

14.name: Expertise (2nd)
14.description: Apply Expertise to two more skill proficiencies.

15.name: Slippery Mind
15.description: Gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

18.name: Elusive
18.description: No attack roll has advantage against you while you are not incapacitated.

20.name: Stroke of Luck
20.description: Once per short or long rest: turn a missed attack roll into a hit, or a failed ability check into a 20.
